title: ptilagrostis luquensis
intro: Ptilagrostis luquensis, also known as Luquillo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Luquillo Mountains in Puerto Rico. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ptilagrostis luquensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
